title: Refreshed Cat Collars
description: A visual refresh for cat collars, bringing them in line with the modern style introduced in the Armored Paws drop
body:
# Why was it created?

After the **_Armored Paws_** drop refreshed the look of wolf collars, cat collars were left behind, retaining an older and noticeably flatter appearance. This resource pack addresses that inconsistency by giving cat collars a modern visual update that better matches Minecraft’s current aesthetic.

# What has changed?

The updated collars are slightly wider and feature smooth color gradients, adding depth and visual charm while staying faithful to the game’s style. Each color feels more polished and intentional, helping cat companions blend naturally with the newer visuals introduced in recent updates.

# Impact on gameplay

This pack is purely visual and does not affect gameplay or mechanics in any way. It is designed to integrate seamlessly with vanilla textures, making it suitable for both survival worlds and modpacks that aim to preserve a cohesive, modern Minecraft look.

# Comparison between Vanilla and Refreshed

![Comparison of Vanilla and Refreshed cat collars](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00e2a29303b6f3457e30e8989bf7131f201680c6.png)
![Comprassion of Vanilla and Refreshed cat collars](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7afe4117fe2b7cd5ddbde68fbc620774d31b6cdf.png)

**You can find more comparisons in the gallery.**
